Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The AddLogTarget method adds a target that will receive log messages accepted by both the manager-level filter and the target-specific filter.
This method is safe to call concurrently with logging.

Note.Paragraph: Ownership of the target is transferred to the log manager. The public API does not provide a method to remove a target after it has been added.
Do not pass a null target. The manager assumes every stored target is valid when a message is forwarded.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void AddLogTarget(ILogTarget::unique_ptr logTarget, ILogger::SeverityFilter severityFilter = ILogger::SeverityFilter::All);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The target object to transfer into the manager.
The severity filter applied to this target after the manager-level filter has accepted a message.
